content.en:
"Didn't you continue to assassinate me?"

After Ye Tian came back from collecting resources, he went out a few more times, but he didn't find that anyone had assassinated him, so he couldn't help but guess.

Obviously, his ability to save his life made the other party give up the assassination for the time being.

However, the fact that the other party no longer assassinates him does not mean that he will forget it.

"Black Tower Heavenly Monarch!"

Ye Tian was full of murderous intent, he didn't know the Black Tower Heavenly Monarch, but the other party came to assassinate him.

He also inquired secretly, the specific identity of the Black Tower Heavenly Monarch was unknown, but the other party had only recently appeared on the Heavenly Monarch List, and as soon as he appeared, he was in the current ranking.

Some people speculate that the other party is the Dark God Society Heavenly Monarch who caused the great changes in the great universe, because the Dark God Society only entered the Great Universe, which is more consistent with this news.

Of course, it is not excluded that there is a chance for the Heavenly Monarch, and after the strength is greatly improved, he instantly enters the Heavenly Monarch List.

But Ye Tian was sure that the other party was a member of the Dark God Society, so the assassination and the above speculation confirmed the identity of the other party 100%.

"Will the Dark God attack me, will it attack on its own initiative, or will someone ask the Dark God to kill me?"

Ye Tian said darkly.

The whereabouts of the Dark God Society are mysterious and difficult to find, and even if someone offers a reward for assassinating him, it will be difficult for him to find the other party.

"I should cultivate a Chaos Divine Power that can mark the mark, so that if someone attacks me again, I can completely find the other party!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

And the dozens or hundreds of chaotic supernatural powers he cultivated, there was no such kind of chaotic supernatural powers.

So, Ye Tian entered the system of the Void Heaven Temple to look for a Chaos Divine Power that could mark the mark, and soon, he really found a similar Chaos Divine Power.

【Infinite Void Technique】

This is a powerful Chaos Divine Power ranked among the top 100 of the Three Thousand Chaos Divine Powers, and it is a kind of Chaotic Divine Power of tracking, once you hit the Myriad Void Life Technique, the other party has no feeling at all, unless you control a special soul-like Chaos Divine Power, or your strength is a big realm higher, otherwise you don't want to crack the Myriad Void Life Technique.

Once the Ten Thousand Void Life Technique is cultivated to the extreme level, it can even mark the true ancestor of the Great Dao Realm with the cultivation of the Heavenly Mandate Realm across the True Spirit Realm.

This shows the power of this chaotic supernatural power.

But the difficulty of cultivating this Chaos Divine Ability is also very exaggerated, because it requires the Void Talent, that is, the Void Talent after the fusion of the Space Talent and the Smell Talent.

The difficulty of fusing the super-god-level spatial talent and the super-god-level olfactory talent into the void talent is too exaggerated.

The super-god-level spatial talent is not too difficult, but the super-god-level olfactory talent is too difficult, and what is even more difficult is the fusion of the two.

And Ye Tian can fuse talents, so the process of fusing is very simple, the only problem is that Ye Tian's olfactory talent has not yet reached the super god level, and his olfactory talent is only at the god level.

If you want to upgrade your god-level talent to the super god level, it is very difficult, and you need to fuse countless god-level olfactory talents, but there are not many god-level olfactory talents in the big universe.

Ye Tian was able to fuse the three basic talents and the twelve attribute talents into a super god level in the long years, which was enough to support the number of foundations.

But if he is allowed to raise his sense of smell talent to the super god level, I don't know how many years it will take.

Therefore, Ye Tian chose to use treasures to improve.

In the Void Heaven Temple system, it is natural to have treasures that can raise a talent to the super god level, although this kind of treasure is very precious, it is not rare.

What is really rare is the treasure of fusion talent, there is no treasure of fusion talent, for the geniuses in the chaos, the whole body is super god-level talent, and there is no way to cultivate the chaos supernatural power.

Immediately, Ye Tian exchanged for a treasure and raised his sense of smell talent to the super god level.

Then, he fused his spatial talent with his smell talent to create a super-god-level void talent.

After that, Ye Tian began to cultivate the Chaos Divine Power of the Myriad Void Life Technique.

For Ye Tian, who had cultivated a large number of Chaos Divine Powers, it was not very difficult to cultivate another Chaos Divine Power, and the difficulty of cultivating Chaos Divine Powers in the Heavenly Mandate Realm was much lower than that of a Divine General.

In addition, Ye Tian also possessed a god-level transcendent comprehension talent, and his soul had transformed to an extremely astonishing level, so it didn't take long to cultivate a chaotic divine power.

Only a thousand years have passed, and the Infinite Void Life Technique has been practiced.

"The Void Life Technique has been practiced, and the Dark God Society may also want to assassinate my forces, I don't know if you dare to do it this time?"

Ye Tian sneered.

Next, Ye Tian went to the outside world a few more times to collect some treasures, but the harvest was not big, and he could gain a few thousand points at most when he went out.

But this day.

Ye Tian deliberately laughed and returned to the Void Heaven Palace, and inadvertently revealed that he had obtained another jade vein called Long Spirit Jade, and Long Spirit Jade was a very precious material, and a small piece of thumb was worth 100 points.

Moreover, Ye Tian also deliberately took out a few pieces of Long Spirit Jade to trade with some disciples, and the total transaction amount reached tens of thousands of points.

Gradually, Ye Tian's smile at obtaining the Long Spirit Jade Vein leaked out.

However, what no one knew was that the news that Ye Tian had obtained the Long Spirit Jade Vein was simply fake.

The real truth was that he exchanged some Long Spirit Jade from the Void Heaven Temple system and then traded it to other disciples.

In this way, he did lose some points, but only a few thousand points, which is not too much.

He deliberately attracted some forces hostile to him, and if he went out like this, maybe the Dark God Society or other forces would attack him again.

That's right, he used himself as bait to lure out those forces and the Dark God Society.

didn't lead to those ill-intentioned people, but instead attracted Peng Yu Tianjun.

-----------

"Wanfa Daozi, I heard that you have obtained the Longling Jade vein, I wonder if you can trade some?"

Peng Yu Tianjun looked flattering.

Although the Void Heaven system also trades Long Spirit Jade, the price is too high, if it is traded from Ye Tian, it will be much cheaper.

Heavenly monarchs like Pengyu Tianjun have more demand for points, so they naturally don't want to waste points.

Looking at Peng Yu Tianjun with an expectant face, Ye Tian sighed and said, "Senior Brother Peng Yu, in fact, I don't have a Long Spirit Jade vein, the news is fake, the truth is that I exchanged a little Long Spirit Jade from the system, and then traded it to other disciples!"

"What??"

Peng Yu Tianjun looked confused.

"Why is that?"

Peng Yu Tianjun believed Ye Tian's words, because Ye Tian, as a Taoist, didn't need to say something to him.

"In order to draw out the forces behind the attack on me!" Ye Tian said coldly.

"This is too dangerous!" Peng Yu Tianjun frowned.

"It's not dangerous!" Ye Tian said with a smile: "My life-saving means, Senior Brother Pengyu should have seen it, I am not exaggerating to say that no one at the Heavenly Monarch level can kill me." And this time is different from the last time, I have practiced the Infinite Life Technique!"

"What, Daozi, you have practiced the Infinite Void Life Technique!!"

Peng Yu Tianjun was shocked.
